title: astragalus tenellus var. strigulosus
intro: Astragalus tenellus var. strigulosus, also known as Strigose Milk Vetch, is a perennial legume plant belonging to the Astragalus genus. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its adaptogenic and immune-modulating properties, which have been found to exhibit antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Astragalus tenellus var. strigulosus include boosting the immune system, reducing inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
